name: Subroutine Logic Core
oracle_text:
When ~ enters, energize.
Whenever you sacrifice an Energon token, untap target artifact.
flavor_text: Optimized for rapid calculation and resource redistribution.
design_notes: This card acts as a value engine for Blue players, specifically targeting the UB/UR archetype requirements. For UR (High-Speed Ignition), it provides tempo by allowing repeated use of artifacts or their Alt-Mode abilities. For UB (Logic Corruption), it assists in resource management and artifact manipulation. At CMC 4, it is priced appropriately as an uncommon engine card that rewards the player for using the Energon mechanic.
